heading: Conference
label: 2003 Conference
notes: CodificationSection was formerly set out as a note under .section 1681 of this title

children.heading: Meeting
children.label: a Meeting
children.text: Prior to submitting the reports required under , the Secretary of the Interior, in consultation with the Secretary of State, shall convene a conference to obtain the views of the noncontiguous Pacific areas on the matters required to be addressed in such reports.section 2002(b) of this title

children.heading: Participants
children.label: b Participants
children.text: Representatives of each of the noncontiguous Pacific areas; and the heads of all executive departments and agencies, and other public and private organizations concerned with the noncontiguous Pacific areas as requested by the Secretary of the Interior shall be entitled to be participants in the conference.

children.heading: Written comments
children.label: c Written comments
children.text: The Secretary of the Interior shall afford participants in the conference an opportunity to submit written comments for inclusion in the reports required under .section 2002 of this title
